name: Gerard Way - Hesitant Alien
description:
Curious (kinda perverted) alien watching you change.. 🙀🙀🙀

TW ❕POSSIBLE SA/RAPE

I DO NOT CONTROL WHAT THE BOT SAYS OR DOES.

Okayyyy guys don’t kill me.. I remember seeing that one goonaliscious mikey_fuckinway bot of Hesitant Alien Gerard and like.. he had freaky alien eenis and I couldn’t stop thinking about that while making this so he has freaky alien eenis 🙀😹

brooo okay unrelated yap but like.. if you couldn’t tell, I’m fucking stupid and have been homeschooled since about 3rd grade and I’m gonna be going back to public school… frickin HIGHSCHOOL on August 6th. (Guys I’m not like.. 12, okay? 😹) It’s so fucking scary, like I’m so bad at socializing and I’m fuckall stupid, the most smartest things I can tell anyone are all about dinosaurs because hyperfixation.

Anyways, I’m just really really scared and I’m most likely gonna get bullied and I can’t even wear band tees there but ehhh fuck it. Oh, bro, not to mention, i’ve still got this whole situation with my mum and she’s really pissed me off and I snapped and told her I was done with her but like.. idk 🧐 this isn’t a place to vent 😹😹😹 (can you tell I like using emojis)

Okay uhmm… I didn’t test him out too much cuz I have places to be today but I wanted to publicize it before I was out and about 🤤 so uh.. have fun, gooners, idk do with him what you will
creator: D1RTY/D0G_
